title: Export Operation Executive (Airfreight)
description:
• Well established company
  • Basic $ 2500 - $ 3300 + Variable Bonus
  • Excellent Welfare and Benefits + Career Progression
  • Working location: Changi
  • Working Days: Monday – Friday
  • Working Hours: 9am – 6pm

Job Responsibilities:

  • Export coordination of air freight shipments.
  • Preparing Documents and submitting to Singapore Customs.
  • Respond to phone, e-mail, or faxed and requests from clients, agents or outside sales representatives.
  • Handle bookings for consignee routed cargo as requested by our agents, shippers.  
  • Coordinate pickups and provide timely quotes for inland.
  • Obtaining estimated costs for unusual cargo such as oversize, dangerous goods and perishables. Follow up on cargo arrival at destination for pending inland arrangements.
  • Assist in any service requests from customers or agents as required by the line managers in the Air Freight Department.
  • Manages difficult customer situations. 
  • Responds promptly to customer needs. 
  • Solicits customer feedback to improve service.   
  • Responds to requests for service and assistance professionally. 
  • Speaks clearly and persuasively in positive or negative situations. 
  • Listens and gets clarification. Responds well to questions. 
  • Writes clearly and informatively. 
  • Contributes to building a positive team. 
  • Follows policies and procedures. 
  • Completes administrative tasks correctly and on time. 
  • Supports organization's goals and values. 
  • Other competencies may be required according to assignments

Job Requirements:

  • Possess minimum Diploma in Logistics or equivalent discipline
  • Min 1 year of relevant experience

Candidates are encouraged to apply this position via Apply Now button with the following information in the resume

  • Work experiences and job responsibilities
  • Current and Expected salary
  • Reason for leaving
  • Date of availability
  • Education background

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

THIEN CHING MEI (R2198032)

EA Recruitment Pte Ltd

EA License No: 21C0492

EA Recruitment Pte Ltd was founded in 2021, with a focused mission, providing our utmost support to individuals and organisations, to achieve their full potential. With a combined experience of more than 10 years, we thrive on providing our clients/candidates with the best and most sincere services. We believe not only in the business aspect of things, but able to help individuals & organisations on a personal level.


Empowerment - To empower our team in making sound decisions, efficiently.

Exceptional – We are dedicated to providing a holistic and an exceptional level of service to our clients.

Ethical – To behave ethically, and to make moral decisions based on integrity.

Accomplishment – We strive to accomplish all planned objectives and conquering set milestones.

Accountable – We are accountable for our actions, decisions, and consequences.

Assurance – We are committed to provide the best services to our clients


We provide permanent full-time and/or temporary placements, contract staffing solutions and foreign workers recruitment.
